'''nagodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squadder|squadder]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-g-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squadder|squadder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nagodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nægedeth|nægedeth]] || [[word:nægedej|nægedej]] || [[word:nægedesh|nægedesh]] || [[word:nægede|nægede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nagogodoth|nagogodoth]] || [[word:nagogodoj|nagogodoj]] || [[word:nagogodosh|nagogodosh]] || [[word:nagogodo|nagogodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nagodoth|nagodoth]] || [[word:nagodoj|nagodoj]] || [[word:nagodosh|nagodosh]] || [[word:nagodo|nagodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nagofdoth|nagofdoth]] || [[word:nagofdoj|nagofdoj]] || [[word:nagofdosh|nagofdosh]] || [[word:nagofdof|nagofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nagodotho|nagodotho]] || [[word:nagodojo|nagodojo]] || [[word:nagodosho|nagodosho]] || [[word:nagodoko|nagodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nagodoth|nagodoth]] || [[word:nagodoj|nagodoj]] || [[word:nagodosh|nagodosh]] || [[word:nagodo|nagodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nagodothol|nagodothol]] || [[word:nagodojol|nagodojol]] || [[word:nagodoshol|nagodoshol]] || [[word:nagodokol|nagodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nagodothotho|nagodothotho]] || [[word:nagodojojo|nagodojojo]] || [[word:nagodoshosho|nagodoshosho]] || [[word:nagodoko|nagodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nagodothon|nagodothon]] || [[word:nagodojon|nagodojon]] || [[word:nagodoshon|nagodoshon]] || [[word:nagodokon|nagodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nagodothoro|nagodothoro]] || [[word:nagodojoro|nagodojoro]] || [[word:nagodoshoro|nagodoshoro]] || [[word:nagodokoro|nagodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
